chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Second Appeal No.273 of 2025 Mst. Gul Pari Versus NADRA Registration Center Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution. (notice could not be issued as sets and process fee not supplied by counsel for appellant. ) Dated: 14.10.2025 None present. -.-.- No one has shown appearance on behalf of the appellant. Same was position on the first call. In the circumstances the Second Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. Judge
